name: Path Problem Skeleton
description: Base skeleton for Python path-problem queries with VulnConfig placeholder.

name: Django Redirect Template
description: Specialised snippet for detecting user-controlled redirect targets.
notes: Import helper predicates calleeIsName, calleeIsAttr, receiverLooksLikeDjangoShortcuts, isRedirectCall. Source is RemoteFlowSource; sink is first argument to redirect-like call.

name: Eval Injection Template
description: Detects user-controlled expressions flowing into eval/exec style sinks (builtins, pandas, PIL).
notes: Use helper predicates calleeIsName, calleeIsAttr, attrReceiverIsLikelyEvalCarrier. Sink targets call.getArg(0) for eval/exec family.
